data: Surrounds the target with layers of force.
Create a protective sphere around yourself, providing you with improved cover.
Channel a fell curse through your gaze.
As disguise self, but you can change the disguise as a swift action.
Instill the target with the ability to withdraw items quickly.
Blast of air deals 2d6 bludgeoning damage and knocks opponent upward.
Enchanted cloak grants shield bonus to AC and can use aid another on you once per round
Conceal a drow's appearance with that of a surface elf.
Vines beneath your feet stabilize you but slow you down.
Enchant someone to climb as well as an ape.
Send or receive a Tiny or smaller animal via teleportation.
Gain +5 armor bonus to your AC, natural attacks are good and silver, and infuse your breath weapon with holy power.
Add your Spellcraft to Craft when creating a magic item.
Magical auras become visible to you.
Merge a melee weapon with a rod or staff.
Use a creature's corpse to adopt its form
Create a phantasm with auditory and visual effects.
Sap the strength of those around you.
Alignment auras become visible to you.
Cause the target to avoid an object or location.
Target becomes nauseated and causes nearby creatures to become fascinated.
Fog obscures the vision of others and extends the range of your hexes.
Hurl a fist sized ball of force to damage your enemy and knock them back.
You take the form and some of the powers of a Small or Medium animal.
Enchant a weapon to deal extra bleed damage.
Create an area of total darkness.
Create an invisible snare to trap weapons.
Create a rippling but unstable wall from the earth.
Compel a companion to take damage for you
Increase the cost to use mythic power.
You randomly vanish and reappear for 1 round per level.
Learn about a creature with its blood.
Inspire a number of creatures into a rage, increaing their strength but lowering their AC.
Magnify the target's ability to smell the presence of blood.
Animate an animal sculpture to be your temporary familiar.
Destroy all writing within an area.
Cause a target's bones to erupt in sharp, jagged spurs, inflicting bleed and sickened
Force heavy encumberance onto a creature.
Target gains a burrow speed of 15.

Summon a swarm of wasps to ward an area.
Surround yourself with an aura of nothingness.
Creates a shelter around a campfire.
Make a willing target appear to be dead.
Infuse a weapon with just enough energy to negate regeneration.
Creates a floating chain of force.
Fuel a target's spellcasting, spontaneously cast spells without expending the slot.
Compel a creature to aid others rather than use violence.
Use rolled dice to grant luck bonuses to future spells.
Creates a screen of wind around you.
Apply a metamagic property to an ally's spell.
Ask more powerful entities to find and converse with you
Grant bonuses and temporary hit points that spread from creature to creature.
Set the condition for triggering a target's readied standard, move, or swift action.
Control a number of vermin for you and your allies to ride.
Draw a recently dead creature's soul into a gem.
Transmute one poison into another of equal or lesser value
Create a dazzling light that only affects those without light sensitivity.
As darkvision, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
As dazzling blade, except with multiple weapons.
Turn a potion into a pool of necromantic energy.
Puts 10 HD of creatures to sleep.
Blame someone else for your actions.
Animate a glove or gauntlet from a distance.
Learn what makes a creautre anxious.
Sense the presence and attributes of mindscapes.
An eidolon temporarily loses 1 evolution +1/five levels.
Fire a cone of slivers that deal 1d6 damage/level and bypass adamantine and cold iron DR.
Touch attack makes a construct helpless for 1 round/level.
Quickly analyze the monetary value of objects and identify which are most valuable.
Dissipate the charges from a technical object or hamper a creature with the robot subtype.
Cancels one magical spell or effect.
Attacks miss subject 50% of the time.
Create an illusion to repulse a vampire.
Noise makes it difficult to cast.
Read thought echoes of a creature mentally controlling another.
Creates a semi-living intelligent draconic servant that loyally obeys and serves you.
Cause living creatures to lose their immunity to fear or mind-affecting effects vs your spells.
Subject can absorb energy damage and enhance melee attacks with it.
Treat the natural attack damage of a creature attacking you as five sizes smaller.
Gain hit points and damage your opponent immediately after counterspelling a spell.
Unleash a tremor that creates difficult terrain and can knock foes down and damage them
Tendril of ectoplasm grapples a creature and tethers you to it.
Target gains the eldritch ague spellblight.
Creates an aura of energy around you.
Transfers your consciousness to an object bearing your likeness.
Eat away at the damage reduction and natural armor of your opponent.
Acid boils burst when you are attacked.
Summon a lens of force to help protect yourself from figments/patterns or identify items.
Target takes Dex and Con damage.
Create a menacing duplicate of yourself to interact with others.
Cause a summoned creature to explode.
Learn many of the target's weaknesses and gain a +5 bonus on your next attack.
Give a creature legs, allowing it to walk on land.
Leak a trail of flame that follows your every step.
Spray a rushing stream of fire from your hand.
As ancestral regression but for disguising a wayang as a gnome.
Ammunition in the targeted firearm creates a tremendous flash capable of blinding the weapon's bearer and those around him.
As summon swarm, but the swarm makes creatures more susceptible to transmutation spells along with penalizing Dexterity.
Subject flies at speed of 60 ft.
Skewer and anchor incorporeal targets with a force anchor.
Target takes force damage and is pushed away.
Warp a creature's flesh, inflicting deformaties and penalties to Constitution and Charisma

Heal yourself with the next spell that also deals damage.
Subject becomes insubstantial and can fly slowly.
Use a single coin as a conduit for eavesdropping.
As per see invisibility, except affecting a creature you touch
Create bolts of negative energy to harm the living or heal the undead, possibly blinding the target.

Use a mass of tentacles to perform dirty tricks.

Use a Harrow deck to predict the future.
One creature/level moves faster, receives +1 on attack rolls, AC, and Reflex saves.
Touched target only gains and grants half the benefits from magical healing
You siphon half of all magical healing that the targeted creature receives.
Enable weapons to overcome DR like adamantine, cold iron, or silver.

Gives +2 on attack rolls, saves, skill checks.

Target's weapons deal damage as if they were smaller.

Levitates the targeted creature up off the ground.

Interfere with the target's ability to speak.

Target takes a -4 penalty on attack rolls, skill checks, and ability checks.

Create insects to scout an area for you.
As invisibility bubble, but capable of affecting larger creatures

Look through a mirror and see out of another mirror.
Make a creature invisible and silent to their allies.
Take on the appearance and some qualities of a ja noi oni.

Add to your ki pool when you critically hit.

Call for a leshy swarm to aid you.
Absorb electricity damage and discharge it with a touch, weapon, or ray
As sepia snake sigil, except using the Thassilonian schools of magic.
You roll damage twice when you roll damage for a critical hit and take the best damage.
Inspire yourself or a lover into a rage against someone who wronged you.

As protection spells, but 10-ft. radius and 10 min./level.
As protection spells, but 10-ft. radius and 10 min./level.
As protection spells, but 10-ft. radius and 10 min./level.
As protection spells, but 10-ft. radius and 10 min./level.
As silent image, plus sound, smell, and thermal effects.
Curse a dying creature to finish it off and gain hero points from its life force.
As magic jar, but limited to line of sight.
Deal damage to yourself to damage the marked target
Cause two creatures to fall in love.
Target gains a message that can be given only to its intended recipient.
As the dream spell, except delivering a shorter message.

Mutate an extremity of the creature touched.

Create up to four motes that shed light or darkness.

Make undead more difficult to control.
Create an immobile wall of tiny black blades.
Use the Path of Numbers to fire rays of elemental energy.
Use the Path of Numbers to grant your allies resilience in the face of elemental dangers.
Distract and fatigue the target with a creature from its nightmares.
Make it permanently easier to learn more about a target.
Diseased creatures in the area become extremely contagious
Create an empathic bond with allies.
+2 enhancement to Dexterity and Intelligence, gain use of any one feat.

As per dimension door, but with more restrictions and affecting a creature you touch

Allow the target's tail to make Dirty Trick or Steal maneuvers.

Absorb 12 points/level of damage from one kind of energy.

As returning weapon, but you may divide the duration among weapons touched.

As scale spikes, except with a higher enhancement bonus.
Treat your normal AC as your touch AC against the next touch attack that targets you.
Extract a half-formed parasitic clone from the target, causing it to siphon blood and distract its host.
As secret chest, except the coffer is smaller and can only remain on the Ethereal Plane for a short time.
Changes one page to hide its real content.

As alarm, but only against selected creatures.

Unobstructed view of the sky from underground

One subject/level takes only one action/round, -1 to AC, Reflex saves, and attack rolls.

Summon animals sacred to your tribe.

Gain two more faces, which grant you bonuses to sight

Step into one doorway and out another.

-6 to an ability score; -4 on attack rolls, saves, and checks; or 50% chance of losing each action.

As suggestion, but triggered only and target doesn't remember the suggestion.

1d6/level acid damage plus 1 round of acid.

Enhanced weapon gets free bull rush attempts on attacks.
You take the form of a Diminutive or Huge animal, or Small or Medium magical beast.
Curse a creature to weaken the DCs of its abilities and deal minimum damage with its attacks
Inflict a specific and feared pirate curse onto your target.
Withers one plant or deals 1d6/level damage to plant creature.
Transform a weapon into pure blightburn.
Boil the blood of your enemies, dealing constitution damage and causing fatigue.
Create writhing tentacles from your chest.
Frees subjects from enchantments, transmutations, and curses.
Scour the life in an area, especially Abyssal life.
Emit a blast of force to damage and knock creatures prone
Teleport a familiar or spirit animal to your side from miles away when it is injured
Reduce the strength of wind in an area.
Excavate and move snow, earth, dust, and loose/packed rocks or ice chunks.
Imbue your blood with corrosive acid, damaging those who wound you.
As charm person, but affects multiple creatures within 30 ft.
Create an area of semi-real gore
Shadows protect you from bright light and grants defensive abilities
Kills 3 HD or less; 4-6 HD save or die, 6+ HD take Con damage.
Reduce the targets move speeds, increased effect with creatures vulnerable to cold iron
Quckly search though a collection of texts to find the right information
Swap places with your animal companion, familiar, or spirit animal via teleportation
As compel tongue, except it affects multiple creatures.
People believe your ridiculous speech as long as you keep talking
Creates a planar conjunction that slows movement, penalizes AC and Reflex saves, and imposes a miss chance on ranged attacks.
Bestow a curse that is difficult to remove without fulfilling the condition.
Paralyze a target with constricting snake coils.
Ask very powerful eldritch entities to find and converse with you, or they may reply telepathically.
Lets you ask question of extraplanar entity.
Cast a suggestion that gets passed on to secondary targets
Sap the powers of beneficial spells cast near to you.
Target is sickened while viewing trigger.
You unleash all the target's anger and destructive urges, causing it to fly into a violent bloodlust.
As dimension door, except you leave behind a burst of flame.
Ward shadows so light cannot penetrate them.
Reshape an undead creature to appear living.
Make someone seem like an obvious liar.
Protect your magic from attempts to dispel it
Target can safely remove its head
Create an invisible circle to trap outsiders.
A stronger version of bleed for your master, this forces the animal servant to intercept any attack that targets you, even if it does not require an attack roll.
Forces a creature to return to native plane.
Cause a tiny item to vanish from existence.
Stop a dragon from using its breath weapon along with reducing its magical prowess.
Receive a clear and memorable view of the layout of the nearby area.
Create a duplicate of your familiar.
Sonic sense gives you blindsight 40 ft.
Turns you into a Medium elemental.
Create a conduit between master and familiar, allowing you to affect one while targeting the other.
A Large siege engine deals energy damage that you designate with other effects depending on the type of energy you choose.
Transforms raw materials into finished items.
Cause divinations of the future to reveal the result you choose.
Targets are panicked, and you gain temporary hit points.
Subject's Int and Cha drop to 1.
Creates a serpentine path of fire 5 ft. long/level that deals 1d6 fire damage/level.
Charge, then teleport back to starting poisiton
Control multiple zombies in human guise.
Creature's armor and shield lose 1 AC and hardness/hour
Learn if an action you are about to take would be too difficult; choose an alternate path if it is.
Gain the power and influence of a genie.
Creates a geyser of boiling water.
Grant a sahuagin unique powers like mutants.
Create a bubble to block out all natural and magical precipitation within an area.
Grant target a +4 competence bonus on any attack, caster level check, saving throw, or skill check (can be used multiple times at higher levels).
Alter the gravity in a 30-foot-radius area.
Increase the power of gravity in an area.
As grease, but with a greater area and/or targets
As lesser guardian monument, except with DR 4/magic.
Transform a half-orc into a full-blooded orc.
Release a wave of energy to repair objects and constructs.
As hold person, but any creature.
You create a dimensional link with a targeted creature, and switch spots with it.
Enchant the ground to pull creatures beneath the surface.
As create pit, but dealing 4d6 damage to those in it as it closes.
Thick ice holds and damages the target.
Force the target to believe nothing in its hoard is missing or disturbed.
Create a small squad of ghouls led by a ghast, charged with necromantic energy.
Temporarily transfer one of your mythic path abilities to another creature.
Protects creatures from sustained environmental effects.
As lighten object, except for multiple objects.
Targets in a line take 1d6 electricity/level.
Phantom dog can guard a location and attack intruders.
Prevents anyone from viewing or scrying an area for 24 hours.
As minor creation, plus stone and metal.
As major creation except the object created is a semi-real illusion.
Imbue targets with animal spirits, granting them unique bonuses.
Protect a creature from divination effects
Mutate a summoned creature to grant it new abilities.
Subjects in fog get -10 to Wis and Will checks.
Learn answers from a subject's memories.
Take the form and some of the powers of a Diminutive or Huge monstrous humanoid.
As naga shape I, with improved abilities
As nondetection, but any number of creatures or objects in the area
As lesser object possession, but with a larger object.
As oneiric horror, plus Str damage.
Assume the form of a Small or Medium ooze creature
Ward off the challenge/smite and similar attempts of an enemy creature.
You fly at a speed of 40 ft. and can hustle over long distances.
As pain strike, but affects multiple creatures.
Shredded parchment deals 1d6 points of damage per level, and has a spell effect if you shred a scroll.
Control the topic of conversation among a group of people.
Creates passage through wood or stone wall.
As peacebond, but on multiple weapons, even if they aren't sheathed.
Fey forces target enemies with random combat maneuvers
As major image, but no concentration required.
Force a creature to see the negative side of things.
Resist harmful effects of other plane.
Use planar energy to protect yourself and retaliate with one energy type
Traps extraplanar creature of 6 HD or less until it performs a task.
As planar adaptation, but only on different worlds of the Material Plane.
Turns you into a Small or Medium plant.
Gives one willing subject a new form.
Project your soul into a creature's body.
Place a protective ward to ensare creatures that attempt to possess you.
Bring a destroyed construct back to action for a limited time.
Stain the hand of a creature's killer red.
Heals undead of 1d8 hp + 1/level; affects 1 undead/level.
Convert bludgeoning and falling damage into nonlethal damage.
Curse a magic item, weakening it and causing its magical qualities to fail half of the time.
Charge magical runes to an explosive degree.
Cause giant mantis limbs to sprout from the ground, damaging and cripping creatures
Create a wall that fascinates creatures that attempt to move through it
As complex hallucination, but without concentration.
Send a message scroll to any location you have previously been
Hides expensive chest on Ethereal Plane; you retrieve it at will.
Weak creatures are compelled to seek shelter
Changes appearance of one person per two levels.
Erase a creature's memory about a single topic.
Mimics evocation of lower than 5th level, but only 20% real.
Temporarily change a target into an animal, humanoid, or monstrous humanoid
Affected creatures have their vision impaired
Transfer a magical effect from another creature to yourself.
Cause a creature to perform a suggested action while sleeping.
Target is distracted by its sense of self.
Sound moves targets away from you.
Reduce the berserk chance of a construct.
Swap your soul with your familiar's.
Use a counterspelled spell's energy in order to regain the use of your own spells.
Create a discordant blast of energy to disrupt a target's hold on magic and transfer it to you.
Sap mythic power from another creature.
As steal years, but steal a greater amount of years and for longer.
As stoneskin, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Restrain a creautre's arms and grant it a second saving throw against certain magic.
As lesser summon genie, except summon one djinni or 1d3 jann.
As summon monster, except to summon a brimorak, incubus, thoxel demon, 1d3 schir demons, or 1d4+1 vermlek demons.
Summon 1d3 esobok psychopomps or 1d4+1 nosoi psychopomps.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
The target takes damage whenever its summoned creature does.
As sun's disdain, but targeting multiple creatures
Temporarily teleport yourself and others to the surface
Triggered rune wracks nearby creatures with pain.
Triggered rune puts nearby creatures into catatonic slumber.
As symbol of death, but fills a 5-foot square.
Moves object, attacks creature, or hurls object or creature.
Instantly transports you as far as 100 miles per level.
Animate dead when a specific trigger condition occurs.
Determine where and when teleportation occurred, and glimpse the origin or destination.
Remove the face and eyes of a creature, magically melding them with your own.
Communicate with any creature with a mind.
Take the form and some of the powers of a Tiny or Large undead.
Create a number of invisible crew members to work on a ship.
Treat penalties from emotion effects as bonuses instead
As fire shield, except attackers take negative energy damage and attacks heal you.
Grow a long, wasp-like tail with stinger.
As vermin shape, but Tiny or Large.
Transform ordinary dogs into fiendish minions.
Make an area seem worthless to others.
Alter the targets so they are light enough to be carried by the wind.
As create pit, but filled with water and contains sharks
Create a wall made up of spinning cogs and gears.
Wall of spirits blocks movement on Material Plane and Ethereal Plane and causes fear.
Create a wall of blinding light.
Sonic wall deflects and damages creatures.
Creates a stone wall that can be shaped.
Create a whip made of poisonous centipedes.
Harden the air around the target into jagged invisible blades.
Fire a ray to deal Dexterity and Strength damage.
Four mithral daggers speed around you, attacking nearby creatures and protecting your spellcasting from attacks of opportunity.
As absorb rune I, but affecting a rune up to 5th level
Mutate someone's shadow and trick the creature into believing they've transformed.
Cone deals 1d4 per level and panics creatures.
You and an ally gain attack and AC bonuses.
You take the form of a Diminutive to Huge animal or a Tiny to Large magical beast.
Ability score drain from the Bleaching doesn't affect your ability score modifiers.
Take extra swift actions at the cost of Con damage.
As chain lightning but with fire damage, albeit at a shorter range.
Hold a creature immobile with glowing chains with the added benefit of preventing the use of any extradimension travel.
Turn a creautre into a mask, which can be used to take on its appearence
Causes living creatures within 5 ft. to fall asleep.
Cone of ice slivers deals 1d6 cold/level.
Ask questions of a Nalfeshnee demon that knows arcana, planes, and a Knowledge skill of your choice.
Infect a subject with a magical disease.
Scorching rays cause 4d6 fire damage, then move on to new targets.
Sets trigger condition for another spell.
Raises or lowers bodies of water.
Attack a creature with cosmic energy.
Create ghasts, ghouls, mohrgs, or mummies.
Sense creatures suffering from fear, then teleport close to them.
Curse an area with six dangerous hazards
As bestow curse, but harder to remove.
As death knell aura, except dying creatures die much faster within the aura.
Turn a critical hit into a decapitation.
Make a creature so delicious that all others nearby are consumed by the desire to eat it.
Focus electricity on destroying a robot or robot-like creation.
Turn your weapon into a two-dimensional object that can more easily bypass armor.
As discharge, but with greater effects that can effect an area.
Reduces one creature or object to dust.
Works as dispel magic, but can affect multiple targets.
Cause a creature to think it is dreaming
Ward an item so it will be destroyed if others try to learn its purpose or use it.
Use Eldritch Conduit on more creatures at greater range.
Shoot a ray made up of multiple energies at your enemy.
Turns you into a Large elemental.
Transform a melee weapon into a powerful burning glaive like ones wielded by the ancient Runelords.
Allows you to telekinetically use a creature as a weapon.
As energy siege shot, but you can affect any size siege engine.
Targets steal from or disarm others.
Step briefly into the Ethereal Plane to avoid attacks and dangers that would otherwise harm you
Explode the head of a creature with 20 hp or fewer and deal damage in a 10-ft. radius around it.
Target becomes panicked, sickened, and/or comatose.
assume the form of a Tiny or Large fey creature
Wave of water batters and pushes creatures
Gain DR 10/slashing, increases reach 10 ft., and breathe water.
Turns you into a Medium esoteric or outer dragon.
Turns you into a Medium dragon.
Turns you into a Medium imperial or primal dragon
Freezes water or deals cold damage.
Conjure balls of flame to throw.
As lesser geas, but affects any creature.
Channel the power of Mammon into a single coin.
Teleports you and select creatures to predetermined location.
As lesser globe of invulnerability, plus 4th-level spell effects.
Array of magic effects protect area.
As harrowing, except affect an entire group of creatures and allow them some measure of control over their destiny.
Quicken a soul's journey to judgement - hampering ressurection or weakening undead foes
Damn creatures to Hell with a blast of pure hellfire.
Gives +4 bonus on attack rolls, saves, skill checks; immunity to fear; temporary hp.
Grant multiple creatures a +2 enhancement bonus to any ability score.
Make it seem like another is responsible for your attacks while concealing your own actions.
Impart a portion of your intellect and personality into a magical item.
As plane shift, but only works on willing creatures and only transports to the Inner Planes
Create evil-seeking tendrils from tall grass and weeds.
As knock, but affecting multiple targets
Enhance your hands into fearsome claws that inflict negative levels.
Create a blade like mage's sword that focuses more on defense.
Target is restricted to a specific location.
Lets you learn tales about a person, place, or thing.
Send a message to creatures within miles.
Recalls spell of 5th level or lower.
Switch minds with another creature for 1 hour per level.
As minor reversion, but one creature per level
Turns you invisible and creates illusory double.
As monstrous physique III, with more abilities.
As naga shape I, with greater abilities
As named bullet, but deals 2 points of damage for every caster level.
Disturb a creature's rest with dark dreams
Redirect the flow of water toward a designated point.
Assume the form of a Large ooze creature
Call forth mighty winds to clear a path for you.

This spell functions like silent image, except that the figment includes visual, auditory, olfactory, and thermal elements, and the spell is permanent. By concentrating, you can move the image within the limits of the range, but it is static while you are not concentrating.
Trick a creature into thinking their flesh is rotting.
Induce an irrational fear in a creature to the point of madness.
see text for lesser planar binding
As lesser planar binding, but up to 12 HD.
Turns you into a Large plant creature.
As major image, plus triggered by event.
Prophesize about a person, place, item, or event
Perform a lengthy mental task in a private mindscape.
Gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls and heal slightly when you kill a creature
As confusion, but only affects constructs.
Learn information to aid you in assassinating a creature
Peaceful feelings harm those attempting violence.
As shadow enchantment, except with higher level enchantments.
Conjure protective wisps of darkness made from shadow.
Alter a creature's body with energy from the Shadow Plane, altering its form to match a shadow creature.
Step into shadow to travel rapidly.
Create a giant symbol of wrath to forcibly repulse all nearby creatures.
Hot wind does 4d6 damage, fatigues those damaged, and knocks creatures prone.
Turn yourself into a creature of semi-solid sound.
Create a spectral saluqi, an undead canine, that can assist you in fighting spirits.
Target loses a 5th-level prepared spell or spell slot.
Summon giant eagles as mounts or battle companions
As lesser summon genie, except summon one shaitan, 1d3 djinn, or 1d4+1 jann.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.

Converts the top layer of the ground into hot tar.
Communicate mentally with creatures within 100 ft.
(Downtime Spell) Teleport a building to a different lot.
Fire raw elemental energy in a 30 ft. long line.
Temporarily grant control of your familiar to another creature.
Transmute a touched object to iron, paper, or wood
As teleport, except you choose some creatures to suffer a mishap or go elsewhere.
As scripted hallucination, but it only appears when triggered.
Lets you see all things as they really are.
Plant a subconscious directive in the target's mind.
Take the form and some of the powers of a Diminutive or Huge undead.
Create a barrier to repel undead.
Target's attitude worsens by two categories.
Changes appearance of group of creatures.
Target is compelled to destroy one enemy.
As per violent misfire, but 1 target/level
30 hp/four levels; can topple onto foes.
Wall of energy that only blocks and affects evil creatures and spells
Infect others with Xhamen-Dor's seeded infestation.
Create a whip made of army ants.
Make one of the creature's limbs useless.
Create a field that prevents advanced technology from entering
Your focus becomes a magical cannon that fires on its own.
As arcane sight, but also reveals magic effects on creatures and objects.
Paralyze all creatures in the area with the sound of a booming trumpet.
Imbue all manufactured weapons in range with magic.
Temporarily suppress the most powerful qualities of a magical item.
Grants the target the benefits of a greater planar infusion
As Bite the Hand but with multiple creatures.
Ask extraordinarily powerful eldritch entities to find and converse with you, or they may reply telepathically.
Undead don't attack you while under your command.
As create mindscape, but affecting more creatures, having a longer duration, and allowing magic alteration.
Create a bog mummy, ice mummy, or Osirian tomb guardian.
Compel targets to commit criminal actions.
Attacks that miss are redirected back to the source of the attack.
1d6/level fire damage; you can postpone blast for up to 5 rounds.
Send messages as per message with one suggestion for each creature.
Teleport multiple times between two designated locations.
Turns you into a Huge elemental.
Hurl elementals from their respective planes onto your enemies.
Infect a subject with a highly contagious disease.
Rip out the targets blood, forming it into a fiendish water elemental with blood drain
Wastes creatures' limited use magical ability.
As false vision, but moves with the target.
Assume the form of a Diminutive or Huge fey creature
Allies gain flaming weapons, immunity to your fire spells, and a one-use ray of fire attack.
One creature/level gains ability to fly.
Cube or cage of force imprisons all inside.
Turns you into a Large esoteric or outer dragon.
Turns you into a Large dragon.
Turns you into a Large imperial or primal dragon
Conjure a Huge mastodon made of ice and snow
Turns you into a Large giant.
Hand provides cover, pushes, or grapples.
Create a Grim to disrupt the targets sleep
As hold person, but all within 30 ft.
Provide a greater heroism effect that you can reverse at any time
You may target one creature for every four of your caster levels.
Give creatures bite attacks and a hunger for their own kind's flesh.
Create an area of massive darkness filled with unseen chewing teeth and ravenous maws.
As inflict pain, but affecting one creature per level.
Transform a robot into a magical construct.
Use magic beetles as spies and also share their senses.
Prepared object appears in your hand.
As inveigle person, but affects any living creature
As invisibility bubble, but affecting all creatures within range
As invisibility, but affects all in range.
Target takes 1d6 sonic/level and is stunned.
Increase the target's size by one category, granting bonuses to Strength, Con, natural armor, damage reduction, and more.
Target cannot leave a lasting impression on other creatures
Transport the target to a dank prison in a horrific demiplane.
Assume the form of a magical beast
Create a spherical magnetic field around yourself to pull metal objects toward you.
Restore a broken object, drained piece of timeworn technology, or destroyed construct to a functional state.
As mydriatic spontaneity, except it can affect multiple creatures.
As possess object, but the object is more powerful and you can possess a construct.
Assume the form of a Huge ooze creature
Targets gain fast healing 1, immunity to bleed, crtitical hits, and precision damage
Sense when nearby creatures have tratorous intent towards your lord
Creates an invisible passage through a barrier.
Make the target a carrier of numerous diseases.
As planar adaptation, but affects multiple creatures.
Enforce the rules of the Material Plane on another plane.
As many as 8 subjects travel to another plane.
As planetary adaptation but on a group of creatures.
Turns you into a Huge plant.
Kill a creature and steal its strongest spell-like ability
Gives one willing subject a new, more powerful form.
Blinds creature with 200 hp or less.
Curse a creature to attract nasty rumors.
Rays hit subjects with variety of effects.
Illusory double can talk and cast spells.
Wear the target corpse like a suit, disguising yourself as the deceased
Target is damaged, staggered, and stunned.
Gain psychic impressions from past events in a location.
Winds block vision and deal 3d6 damage per round.
As scrying, but faster and longer.
As seeds of influence, but have a chance to dispel protective magic before it takes effect
Subject is invisible to sight and scrying; renders creature comatose.
Turn your body into a living shadow.
As shadow conjuration, but up to 6th level and 60% real.
Temporarily change a target into an animal, elemental, fey, humanoid, monstrous humanoid, or vermin
Creates partially real double of a creature.
Easily transfer a soul from one receptacle to another, or capture vulnerable souls that aren't bound to mortal flesh.
Create a whip that can lash spells from the minds of enemy spellcasters.
Reflect 1d4+6 spell levels back at caster.
Subject can become a statue at will.
As scorching ray, but once per round and works underwater
Convince yourself that something is an illusion, granting you the ability to ignore its actual presence.
Turn a ship into a submarine.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
As teleport, but affects a touched object.
Create a trap that redirects teleport attempts into an area of your choosing.
As teleport, but no range limit and no off-target arrival.
Take two distinct actions, learn the results, than choose one to take effect
Bring a creature to life for 24 hours.
Expend mythic power to alter the immediate area's climate and terrain.
Throw a bolt of dark energy, dealing cold and negative energy damage.
You can spend a move action to teleport 30 feet or to stand while prone without provoking attacks of opportunity.
As sending, but the target gets the ability to teleport to your side if they desire
As angelic aspect, lesser except granting the greatest qualities of angelic creatures.
Object or location affected by spell repels certain creatures.
Place an even greater curse on the subject.
Utilizes an array of techniques to imprison a creature.
As charm monster, but all within 30 ft.
Large hand provides cover, pushes, or attacks your foes.
As lesser create demiplane, but larger and with planar traits.
Create shadows, wraiths, spectres, or devourers.
Curse an area with eternal night
Curse an area with seven deadly hazards
As sending, plus you can send suggestion.
Teleportation and interplanar travel blocked for 1 day/level.
Reveals exact location of creature or object.
Turn a location into a secure, underground vault
Create a portal that allows travel to the First World
As fleeting memory, except that it affects multiple creatures.
Turns you into a Huge esoteric or outer dragon.
Turns you into a Huge dragon.
Turns you into a Huge imperial or primal dragon.
You take on a terrifying, Large-sized form of yourself and emit an aura that causes creatures to become shaken or frightened.
Turns you into a Huge giant.
Imbue a creature with the strength and toughness of the greatest megafauna of the tundra.
As instant summons, but for multiple objects and creatures.
Permanently turn someone into a crazed criminal.
Create a destructive and chaotic rip in reality.
Subject is protected from mental/emotional magic and scrying.
You gain +1/level insight bonus on single attack roll, check, or save.
Enemy and ally can only harm and be harmed by each other
see text for lesser planar binding
As lesser planar binding, but up to 18 HD.
Ranged touch attack deals 1d6/level cold damage and 1d4 points of Dexterity drain.
Changes a subject into anything else.
As possession, but your body vanishes.
Stuns creature with 150 hp or less.
Target is permanently shaken and sickened, and may gain a spellblight.
Wall's colors have array of effects.
As prying eyes, but eyes have true seeing.
Exercise limited control over the quintessence of an Outer Plane, creating or shaping terrain
Conjure a cloud of magical arrows.
Create a rift filled with demons that extends into the Abyss.
Twisting colors confuse, stun, or render unconscious.
Illusion hides area from vision and scrying.
As secret chest, except it affects a small structure, vault, or oversized chest.
As shadow evocation, but up to 7th level and 60% real.
Devastating yell deals 10d6 sonic damage; stuns creatures.
Deal 1d6 damage/level to living creatures in a 20-ft. radius area.
Use Spell Absorption with higher level spells.
Target loses a 7th-level prepared spell or spell slot.
Cause spells cast within an area to trigger primal magic effects.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Blinds all within 10 ft., deals 6d6 damage.
Conjure a symbol that makes all who see it lust for each other.
Dispel all magical effects within range of this symbol.
Triggered rune renders nearby creatures insane.
Object or location attracts certain creatures.
As resilient sphere, but you move the sphere telekinetically.
Set a beacon in time that you can rewind to
As umbral infusion, except it can affect multiple mindless undead creatures.
Summon a replica of the target that attempts to kill them
As undead anatomy III, but with more abilities.
Wall damages foes that try to enter, periodically launches lava at nearby targets.
Control weather in a large area that moves with you
As absorb rune I, but affecting a rune up to 8th level
Create an area to completely block out spells of your choosing.
Projects you and companions onto Astral Plane.
Exist in two places at once.
Eviscerate a target, creating an advanced mummy from its life essence.
As create demiplane, but larger and with more planar traits.
Large hand provides cover, pushes, or crushes your foes.
Plants die, living creatures catch diseases, or dead creatures rise as zombies.
As dominate person, but any creature.
Create a combination spherical wall of force and antimagic field.
Travel to Ethereal Plane with companions.
Assume the form of a powerful fey creature
Connects two planes for travel or summoning.
Grants a number of creatures bonuses on attacks and damage, temporary hit points, and immunity to fear and charm effects.
As hold monster, but all within 30 ft.
As icy prison, but it affects 1 creature/level.
Target can use stealth to hide from blindsight and blindsense as well as divination magic
As Last Azlanti's defending sword, but with multiple swords
As lost passage, except covering a much larger area.
Send a target into a dangerous extradimensional maze.
Four exploding spheres each deal 6d6 fire damage.
As mind blank, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Creatures bow before you as if you were divine.
Force a trapped soul into a new body.
Kills one creature with 100 hp or less.
As prismatic wall, but surrounds on all sides.
Alters item to transport its possessor to you.
Conjure an opulent mansion several stories tall.
Create a potent rune that evokes the mighty Oliphant of Jandelay, warding the area against chaos and destruction.
Pull together the remains of a shipwreck and reform it into a working vessel.
Blast an area with soul-rending energy, dealing 1d4 negative levels and 1d6 acid/level.
Turn a creature into a biography of their life.
As shadow conjuration, but up to 8th level and 80% real.
As shadow transmutation, but it mimics greater polymorph instead of polymorph.
Transforms you into certain creatures, and you can change forms once per round.
Traps newly dead soul to prevent resurrection.
As summon monster, except to summon a coloxus, omox demon, or 1d3 kalavakus demons.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Target takes acid damage each round, and its attackers take acid damage.
Turn one type of golem into another.
Huge wave damages and sweeps up all in its path.
As phantasmal killer, but affects all within 30 ft.
Gives you the ability to fly and attack with wind.
As limited wish, but with fewer limits.
Creates 1d4+2 temporary wood golems to fight for you.
Use this symbol to subject all who view it to the will of Hastur.

occult_rituals.title: Occult Rituals
description: Information about occult rituals can be found [here](rule/occult_rituals).

data: Grant a group an increased capacity to research and learn
Prevents creatures of a specific type or subtype from interacting with a specific door.
Use a formal tea ceremony to gain a +4 moral bonus against fear
Create a ‹spell/magic circle›, as the spell.
A formal ritual that inducts a new member of an organization
Destroy a haunt through a psychic duel
Casters gain a +1 luck bonus to saving throws for 3 months
Part one of the fiendish transformation. The caster's alignment becomes evil
Create a ‹monster/hag eye ooze› loyal to the caster
Wards a ship to protect against weather and prevent from getting lost
Produces a small, unbreakable barrier of force that protects a single item.
Tap into the knowledge of the Monad
Turn a campsite into a defensible terrain
Gain the ability to see through the eyes of the target
Gain clues on how to permanently destroy a neutralized haunt
Imbue humanoids with primal strength and power
Turn the targets into mice-like creatures that are innately afraid of cats
Create a barrier that blocks the movement and abilities of a certain type of creatures
Imbue a dagger with the ability to tear a destructive hole between the Material Plane and the Ethereal Plane
Induct an additional coven member beyond the normal limit of 3 members
Temporarily gain the Haunt Scavenger feat
